revision.comment: [[大伴神社]]を[[大伴神社 (高岡市)]]へ移動: 当神社名は他所にも存在するため、現在のページを曖昧回避ページとするため。
revision.text: #転送 [[大伴神社 (高岡市)]]

revision.comment: 曖昧回避ページ
revision.text:
{{aimai}} '''大伴神社'''（おおともじんじゃ）は、[[日本]]の[[神社]]。 *[[大伴神社 (高岡市)]] - [[富山県]][[高岡市]]伏木一宮に鎮座。 *[[大伴神社 (佐久市望月)]] - [[長野県]][佐久市]]望月に鎮座。[[式内社]]論社。 *[[大伴神社 (佐久市野澤)]] - 長野県佐久市野澤に鎮座。 *[[住吉大伴神社]] - [[京都府]][[京都市]][[右京区]]龍安寺住吉町に鎮座。式内社論社。 *[[大伴黒主神社]] - [[大阪府]][[富田林市]]山中田町に鎮座。
{{DEFAULTSORT:おおともしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

{{aimai}} '''大伴神社'''（おおともじんじゃ）は、[[日本]]の[[神社]]。 *[[大伴神社 (高岡市)]] - [[富山県]][[高岡市]]伏木一宮に鎮座。 *[[大伴神社 (佐久市望月)]] - [[長野県]][[佐久市]]望月に鎮座。[[式内社]]論社。 *[[大伴神社 (佐久市野澤)]] - 長野県佐久市野澤に鎮座。 *[[住吉大伴神社]] - [[京都府]][[京都市]][[右京区]]龍安寺住吉町に鎮座。式内社論社。 *[[大伴黒主神社]] - [[大阪府]][[富田林市]]山中田町に鎮座。
{{DEFAULTSORT:おおともしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

{{aimai}} '''大伴神社'''（おおともじんじゃ）は、[[日本]]の[[神社]]。 *[[大伴神社 (高岡市)]] - [[富山県]][[高岡市]]伏木一宮に鎮座。 *[[大伴神社 (佐久市望月)]] - [[長野県]][[佐久市]]望月に鎮座。[[式内社]]論社。 *[[大伴神社 (佐久市野澤)]] - 長野県佐久市野澤に鎮座。 *[[住吉大伴神社]] - [[京都府]][[京都市]][[右京区]]龍安寺住吉町に鎮座。式内社論社。 *[[大伴黒主神社]] - [[大阪府]][[富田林市]]山中田町に鎮座。 *[[大伴神社 (大津市)]] - [[滋賀県]][[大津市]]南志賀に鎮座。
{{DEFAULTSORT:おおともしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

{{aimai}} '''大伴神社'''（おおともじんじゃ）は、[[日本]]の[[神社]]。 *[[大伴神社 (高岡市)]] - [[富山県]][[高岡市]]伏木一宮に鎮座。 *[[大伴神社 (佐久市望月)]] - [[長野県]][[佐久市]]望月に鎮座。[[式内社]]論社。 *[[大伴神社 (佐久市野澤)]] - 長野県佐久市野澤に鎮座。 *[[住吉大伴神社]] - [[京都府]][[京都市]][[右京区]]龍安寺住吉町に鎮座。式内社論社。 *[[大伴黒主神社]] - [[大阪府]][[富田林市]]山中田町に鎮座。 *[[大伴神社(大伴黒主神社:大友黒主神社) (大津市)]] - [[滋賀県]][[大津市]]南志賀に鎮座。
{{DEFAULTSORT:おおともしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''大伴神社'''（おおともじんじゃ）は、[[日本]]の[[神社]]。
*[[大伴神社 (高岡市)]] - [[富山県]][[高岡市]]伏木一宮に鎮座。 *[[大伴神社 (佐久市望月)]] - [[長野県]][[佐久市]]望月に鎮座。[[式内社]]論社。 *[[大伴神社 (佐久市野澤)]] - 長野県佐久市野澤に鎮座。 *[[大伴神社 (大津市)]] - [[滋賀県]][[大津市]]南志賀に鎮座。大伴黒主神社、大友黒主神社とも。 *[[住吉大伴神社]] - [[京都府]][[京都市]][[右京区]]龍安寺住吉町に鎮座。式内社論社。 *[[大伴黒主神社]] - [[大阪府]][[富田林市]]山中田町に鎮座。
{{aimai}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおともしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.text:
'''Ōtomo Shrine''' (大伴神社) refers to several shrines in Japan.
* {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Takaoka)|ja|大伴神社 (高岡市)}} - Located in Fushiki Ichinomiya, Takaoka City, Toyama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Saku, Mochizuki)|ja|大伴神社 (佐久市望月)}} - Located in Mochizuki, Saku City, Nagano Prefecture. Considered a candidate for an {{ill|Ancient shrine|ja|式内社}}. * {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Saku, Nozawa)|ja|大伴神社 (佐久市野澤)}} - Located in Nozawa, Saku City, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Ōtsu)|ja|大伴神社 (大津市)}} - Located in Minamishiga, Ōtsu City, Shiga Prefecture. Also known as Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine or Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine. * {{ill|Sumiyoshi Ōtomo Shrine|ja|住吉大伴神社}} - Located in Ryōanji Sumiyoshichō, Ukyo-ku, Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture. Considered a candidate for an ancient shrine. * {{ill|Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine|ja|大伴黒主神社}} - Located in Yamanakata-chō, Tondabayashi City, Osaka Prefecture.
{{aimai}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]]

Considered a candidate for an {{ill|Ancient shrine|ja|式内社}}. * {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Saku, Nozawa)|ja|大伴神社 (佐久市野澤)}} - Located in Nozawa, Saku City, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Ōtsu)|ja|大伴神社 (大津市)}} - Located in Minamishiga, Ōtsu City, Shiga Prefecture. Also known as Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine or Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine. * {{ill|Sumiyoshi Ōtomo Shrine|ja|住吉大伴神社}} - Located in Ryōanji Sumiyoshichō, Ukyo-ku, Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture. Considered a candidate for an ancient shrine. * {{ill|Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine|ja|大伴黒主神社}} - Located in Yamanakata-chō, Tondabayashi City, Osaka Prefecture.

Considered a candidate for an ancient shrine. * {{ill|Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine|ja|大伴黒主神社}} - Located in Yamanakata-chō, Tondabayashi City, Osaka Prefecture.

Also known as Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine or Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine. * {{ill|Sumiyoshi Ōtomo Shrine|ja|住吉大伴神社}} - Located in Ryōanji Sumiyoshichō, Ukyo-ku, Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture. Considered a candidate for an ancient shrine. * {{ill|Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine|ja|大伴黒主神社}} - Located in Yamanakata-chō, Tondabayashi City, Osaka Prefecture.

'''Ōtomo Shrine''' (大伴神社) refers to several shrines in Japan.
* {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Takaoka)|ja|大伴神社 (高岡市)}} - Located in Fushiki Ichinomiya, Takaoka City, Toyama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Saku, Mochizuki)|ja|大伴神社 (佐久市望月)}} - Located in Mochizuki, Saku City, Nagano Prefecture. Considered a candidate for an {{ill|Ancient shrine|ja|式内社}}. * {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Saku, Nozawa)|ja|大伴神社 (佐久市野澤)}} - Located in Nozawa, Saku City, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Ōtsu)|ja|大伴神社 (大津市)}} - Located in Minamishiga, Ōtsu City, Shiga Prefecture. Also known as Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine or Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine. * {{ill|Sumiyoshi Ōtomo Shrine|ja|住吉大伴神社}} - Located in Ryōanji Sumiyoshichō, Ukyo-ku, Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture. Considered a candidate for an ancient shrine. * {{ill|Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine|ja|大伴黒主神社}} - Located in Yamanakata-chō, Tondabayashi City, Osaka Prefecture.

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] on (CatAlot)
revision.text:
'''Ōtomo Shrine''' (大伴神社) refers to several shrines in Japan.
* {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Takaoka)|ja|大伴神社 (高岡市)}} - Located in Fushiki Ichinomiya, Takaoka City, Toyama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Saku, Mochizuki)|ja|大伴神社 (佐久市望月)}} - Located in Mochizuki, Saku City, Nagano Prefecture. Considered a candidate for an {{ill|Ancient shrine|ja|式内社}}. * {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Saku, Nozawa)|ja|大伴神社 (佐久市野澤)}} - Located in Nozawa, Saku City, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Ōtsu)|ja|大伴神社 (大津市)}} - Located in Minamishiga, Ōtsu City, Shiga Prefecture. Also known as Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine or Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine. * {{ill|Sumiyoshi Ōtomo Shrine|ja|住吉大伴神社}} - Located in Ryōanji Sumiyoshichō, Ukyo-ku, Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture. Considered a candidate for an ancient shrine. * {{ill|Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine|ja|大伴黒主神社}} - Located in Yamanakata-chō, Tondabayashi City, Osaka Prefecture.

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
'''Ōtomo Shrine''' (大伴神社) refers to several shrines in Japan.
* {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Takaoka)|ja|大伴神社 (高岡市)}} - Located in Fushiki Ichinomiya, Takaoka City, Toyama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Saku, Mochizuki)|ja|大伴神社 (佐久市望月)}} - Located in Mochizuki, Saku City, Nagano Prefecture. Considered a candidate for an {{ill|Ancient shrine|ja|式内社}}. * {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Saku, Nozawa)|ja|大伴神社 (佐久市野澤)}} - Located in Nozawa, Saku City, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Ōtsu)|ja|大伴神社 (大津市)}} - Located in Minamishiga, Ōtsu City, Shiga Prefecture. Also known as Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine or Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine. * {{ill|Sumiyoshi Ōtomo Shrine|ja|住吉大伴神社}} - Located in Ryōanji Sumiyoshichō, Ukyo-ku, Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture. Considered a candidate for an ancient shrine. * {{ill|Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine|ja|大伴黒主神社}} - Located in Yamanakata-chō, Tondabayashi City, Osaka Prefecture.

revision.text:
'''大伴神社'''（おおともじんじゃ）は、[[日本]]の[[神社]]。
*[[大伴神社 (高岡市)]] - [[富山県]][[高岡市]]伏木一宮に鎮座。 *[[大伴神社 (佐久市望月)]] - [[長野県]][[佐久市]]望月に鎮座。[[式内社]]論社。 *[[大伴神社 (佐久市野澤)]] - 長野県佐久市野澤に鎮座。 *[[大伴神社 (大津市)]] - [[滋賀県]][[大津市]]南志賀に鎮座。大伴黒主神社、大友黒主神社とも。 *[[住吉大伴神社]] - [[京都府]][[京都市]][[右京区]]龍安寺住吉町に鎮座。式内社論社。 *[[大伴黒主神社]] - [[大阪府]][[富田林市]]山中田町に鎮座。
{{aimai}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおともしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[大伴神社]] to [[Ōtomo Shrine (Saku)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大伴神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11432350]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Ōtomo Shrine''' (大伴神社) refers to several shrines in Japan.
* {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Takaoka)|ja|大伴神社 (高岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo Shrine (Takaoka)|qq=|1=Ōtomo Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432351}} - Located in Fushiki Ichinomiya, Takaoka City, Toyama Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Saku, Mochizuki)|ja|大伴神社 (佐久市望月)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo Shrine (Saku, Mochizuki)|qq=}} - Located in Mochizuki, Saku City, Nagano Prefecture. Considered a candidate for an {{ill|Ancient shrine|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient shrine|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. * {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Saku, Nozawa)|ja|大伴神社 (佐久市野澤)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo Shrine (Saku, Nozawa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Nozawa, Saku City, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtomo Shrine (Ōtsu)|ja|大伴神社 (大津市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo Shrine (Ōtsu)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Minamishiga, Ōtsu City, Shiga Prefecture. Also known as Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine or Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine. * {{ill|Sumiyoshi Ōtomo Shrine|ja|住吉大伴神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumiyoshi Ōtomo Shrine|qq=}} - Located in Ryōanji Sumiyoshichō, Ukyo-ku, Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture. Considered a candidate for an ancient shrine. * {{ill|Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine|ja|大伴黒主神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo Kurohito Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yamanakata-chō, Tondabayashi City, Osaka Prefecture.
